title: Build a New Workflow
prompt:
I want to design a repeatable workflow in OpenClaw.
Goal: [goal]
Inputs: [files/tools]
Constraints: [safety, time, scope]
Output format: [checklist/template/report]
Please produce:
1) workflow steps,
2) failure modes,
3) troubleshooting,
4) version 1 checklist.

title: Audit Existing Setup
prompt:
Audit my current OpenClaw setup for performance and reliability.
Review:
- identity files
- memory hygiene
- tool usage patterns
- delegation quality
Then provide:
1) top 5 risks,
2) top 5 improvements,
3) a 7-day upgrade plan.

title: Delegation Spec
goal: Create clear instructions for delegated sessions
prompt:
Prepare a delegation brief for a focused execution session.
Task objective: [objective]
Constraints: [scope, safety, files]
Acceptance criteria: [criteria]
Output format: [diff/report/checklist]
Return:
1) exact task brief,
2) quality checks,
3) merge-back checklist.

title: Weekly Memory Distillation
goal: Promote daily notes to long-term memory
prompt:
Review the last 7 daily memory notes and distill durable facts into MEMORY.md.
Include:
- decisions to keep
- preferences to keep
- stale items to remove
- unresolved open loops
